# createAsyncPort

**Instance Property**

Creates an async port.

## Declaration

```swift
IOReturn (*createAsyncPort)(void *self, mach_port_t *port);
```

## Parameters

- **port**: The newly created async port.

## Return Value

Returns an IOReturn code.

## Discussion

This will be used with createAsyncEventSource.
